metadata.description: The person appears to be a male in their 20s or early 30s, with warm olive skin and a smooth texture. Their face is an oval shape with a softly defined jawline. Dark brown, wavy hair, parted slightly off-center, cascades past the shoulders, framing the face. The eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. Thick, dark eyebrows have a natural, slightly arched shape. The nose is straight with a rounded tip. The mouth has medium-full lips with a well-defined Cupid's bow. A light stubble covers the chin and jawline. The person's head is angled slightly to the left, with a neutral, calm expression.
